channel.title: WBD — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on WBD (Warner Bros. Discovery) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Seth Klarman: TRIMMED WBD (-12%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) trimmed WBD in Q4 2025 · 10.2% of portfolio. Continued Warner Bros. profit-taking.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Seth Klarman)

item.title: Seth Klarman: TRIMMED WBD (-15%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) trimmed WBD in Q3 2025 · 11.8% of portfolio. Taking Warner Bros. profits.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Seth Klarman)

item.title: Seth Klarman: TRIMMED WBD (-10%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) trimmed WBD in Q2 2025 · 13.0% of portfolio. Starting the Warner Bros. exit.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Seth Klarman)

item.title: Seth Klarman: TRIMMED WBD (-8%) · Q4 2024
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) trimmed WBD in Q4 2024 · 13.5% of portfolio. Small Warner Bros trim.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Seth Klarman)

item.title: Seth Klarman: TRIMMED WBD (-10%) · Q3 2024
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) trimmed WBD in Q3 2024 · 14.5% of portfolio. WBD reduction.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Seth Klarman)

item.title: Seth Klarman: TRIMMED WBD (-12%) · Q2 2024
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) trimmed WBD in Q2 2024 · 16.0% of portfolio. WBD reduction.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Seth Klarman)

item.title: Seth Klarman: ADDED WBD (+8%) · Q1 2024
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) added WBD in Q1 2024 · 18.0% of portfolio. WBD initial conviction.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Seth Klarman)
